title: codereview-P3: parse_packet oneof validation for MeshPacket.decoded/encrypted
description: Missing check in lichen/subsys/lichen/meshtastic/adapter.c:879 for mutual exclusivity of decoded and encrypted fields (protobuf oneof). Current implementation allows last field to win, which can be used for smuggling or bypass. Should set kind=MALFORMED and increment malformed_count if both present. Test at lichen/tests/meshtastic_adapter/src/main.c:2641 expects unsupported instead. This is P3 correctness issue per review criteria.
